name: project
license: Copyright (c) 2026 Example, LLC. All Rights Reserved.

scripts.start: npm run stop && pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs && pm2 monit
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run sync && tsc && npm run minify && rimraf dist/dev && rimraf dist/sandbox && rimraf dist/src/types
scripts.minify: npx esbuild "dist/**/*.js" --format=esm --minify --banner:js='/* This file is part of Project. Copyright (c) 2026 Example, LLC. All Rights Reserved. */' --outdir=dist --allow-overwrite
scripts.init: npm install && npm run get:kage-library && npm run rename:env && npm run rename:crt && npm run rename:key && npm run clean:delete-me && npm run get:pm2
scripts.rename:crt: shx mv config/ssl/example.com.crt.example config/ssl/example.com.crt && shx mv config/ssl/dev.example.com.crt.example config/ssl/dev.example.com.crt
scripts.rename:key: shx mv config/ssl/example.com.key.example config/ssl/example.com.key && shx mv config/ssl/dev.example.com.key.example config/ssl/dev.example.com.key
scripts.get:kage-library: git clone --depth=1 --filter=blob:none --sparse https://github.com/AvatarKage/kage-library tmp-kage-library && cd tmp-kage-library && git sparse-checkout set typescript && cd .. && cpx "tmp-kage-library/typescript/backend/**/*" src/ && rimraf tmp-kage-library
